'''malate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quakingly|quakingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-l-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quakingly|quakingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| malate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:malate|malate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:malatesher|malatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:malatesherĂ«m|malatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:malatero|malatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:malateshĂ«|malateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:malateshĂ«m|malateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimalatero|gokimalatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimalateshĂ«|gokimalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimalateshĂ«m|gokimalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomalankerom|gomalankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomalankeshĂ«|gomalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomalankeshĂ«m|gomalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomalankeya|gomalankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:malaterom|malaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:malatemu|malatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:malateya|malateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimalaterom|gokimalaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimalatemu|gokimalatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimalateya|gokimalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:malalate|malalate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:malalatesher|malalatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:malalatesherĂ«m|malalatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:malalatero|malalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:malalateshĂ«|malalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:malalateshĂ«m|malalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimalalatero|gokimalalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimalalateshĂ«|gokimalalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimalalateshĂ«m|gokimalalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomalalankerom|gomalalankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomalalankeshĂ«|gomalalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomalalankeshĂ«m|gomalalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomalalankeya|gomalalankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:malalaterom|malalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:malalatemu|malalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:malalateya|malalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimalalaterom|gokimalalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimalalatemu|gokimalalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimalalateya|gokimalalateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:mĂŠlĂŠte|mĂŠlĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mĂŠlĂŠtesher|mĂŠlĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m|mĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠlĂŠtero|mĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|mĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|mĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠlĂŠtero|gokimĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|gokimĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|gokimĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomĂŠlĂŠnkerom|gomĂŠlĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«|gomĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gomĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomĂŠlĂŠnkeya|gomĂŠlĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠlĂŠterom|mĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠlĂŠtemu|mĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mĂŠlĂŠteya|mĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠlĂŠterom|gokimĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠlĂŠtemu|gokimĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimĂŠlĂŠteya|gokimĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:maflafte|maflafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:maflaftesher|maflaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:maflaftesherĂ«m|maflaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:maflaftero|maflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:maflafteshĂ«|maflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:maflafteshĂ«m|maflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimaflaftero|gokimaflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimaflafteshĂ«|gokimaflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimaflafteshĂ«m|gokimaflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomaflafnkerom|gomaflafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomaflafnkeshĂ«|gomaflafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomaflafnkeshĂ«m|gomaflafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomaflafnkeya|gomaflafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:maflafterom|maflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:maflaftemu|maflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:maflafteya|maflafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimaflafterom|gokimaflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimaflaftemu|gokimaflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimaflafteya|gokimaflafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
